svg.text: Webb EoE ↔ Anthropic paper: structural convergence

g.text: EP (maintain/increase {self} value) ∆ P (perception + appraisal) = ER (emotional response)

svg.text: key behavioral findings and their EoE explanations

g.text: Extreme action justified by extreme EP violation
Lower perceived intensity = lower severity score
Falls below threshold for extreme behavioral response
EoE: {relational bond} EP overrides epistemic EP
High-arousal items lose power during training
Equivalent to clinical map editing for resilience
EoE: per-perception triggering is the mechanism
EoE is pre-conscious, event-driven, not mood-based
Attention = context recall fills the "persistent" gap
Geometry: valence PC1 (r=0.81) + arousal PC2 (r=0.66) mirror human affective circumplex
EoE predicts: positive match = +valence; high power × high intensity = high arousal
The two-dimensional structure of EoE severity × sign is exactly the circumplex
